meaning: n.油脂,贿赂vt.涂脂于,<俗>贿赂
examples: He could smell the bacon grease.
His dungarees were covered in grease.
His hair is thick with grease.
"You need a different strain for grease than you do for gelatin, " he explains.
He could eat the snack with just one hand and wouldn't get grease on anything.
